programs.title: Jingle Belle
programs.desc: (G) A successful jingle writer is cajoled into returning to her hometown to write a song for the 50th anniversary of the annual Christmas Eve concert.

programs.title: Love At First Like
programs.desc: (PG) A cynical journalist is assigned to cover a handsome celebrity who offers dating advice for women, and ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.
